description: Hardware capability matrix for AI acceleration backend promotion. SSOT for backend eligibility, fallback chains, and ROCm promotion criteria. Never hardcode backend selection in scripts — look up from this file.

vulkan.description: Vulkan compute via Mesa RADV (AMD) or ANV (Intel). Best-effort partial offload for APUs; full offload for discrete GPUs.

rocm.description: AMD ROCm/HIP native GPU compute. Full offload, best throughput on supported discrete GPUs. Requires exact hardware class validation before use.

cuda.description: NVIDIA CUDA. Full offload on supported NVIDIA GPUs.

metal.description: Apple Metal. macOS / Apple Silicon only.

cpu.description: CPU-only inference via GGML. Universal fallback; no GPU dependency.

promotion_pipeline.description: Stages a backend must pass before it can be set as default_backend for a hardware class.

stages.description: Identify hardware class in capability matrix; check promotion_eligible flag in ROCm compat matrix.
Verify the rocm_compat_key entry is not blocked and the GFX target is in the supported set.
Start llama-server with candidate backend (--n-gpu-layers 99), reach /health within 120 s for 3 consecutive runs.
Confirm no amdgpu GPU reset / ErrorDeviceLost events in journald since cold_start runs.
Measure candidate tok/s vs current default tok/s. Candidate must meet or exceed the class benchmark_win_threshold_pct.
Candidate backend must have run cleanly for at least soak_hours with no failures before promotion is recorded.

status_descriptions.blocked: Definitively unsafe on this hardware class. Do not promote.
status_descriptions.unknown: Not yet evaluated. No evidence for or against.
status_descriptions.experimental: Stages 1-2 pass; cold_start and hang_check not yet run.
status_descriptions.candidate: Stages 1-4 pass; in soak period; benchmark not yet run or threshold not met.
status_descriptions.production: All 6 stages pass; safe to use as default_backend.

amd-apu-renoir.description: AMD Renoir APU — Ryzen 4000/5000 series (gfx902). Shared VRAM with system RAM. ThinkPad P14s Gen 2a, Ryzen 5000 APU laptops.
amd-apu-renoir.promotion_blocked_reason: Renoir iGPU (gfx902) is not in the official ROCm support matrix. Full-layer offload causes ErrorDeviceLost. Shared VRAM with system RAM causes OOM above 12 layers.
amd-apu-renoir.notes: Vulkan partial offload (12 layers) is the validated stable path. Full 41-layer Vulkan offload also causes ErrorDeviceLost — set --n-gpu-layers 12 explicitly.

amd-apu-cezanne.description: AMD Cezanne APU — Ryzen 5000 desktop APU (gfx90c). Radeon Vega integrated graphics.
amd-apu-cezanne.promotion_blocked_reason: gfx90c APU is not in the official ROCm support matrix.

amd-apu-rembrandt.description: AMD Rembrandt APU — Ryzen 6000 series (gfx1035). RDNA2 iGPU.
amd-apu-rembrandt.notes: Rembrandt RDNA2 iGPU has partial ROCm community support via gfx1035 override. Requires validation before candidate promotion.

amd-rdna1-dgpu.description: AMD RDNA1 discrete GPU — RX 5000 series (gfx1010/1011/1012). Navi10/12/14.
amd-rdna1-dgpu.notes: RDNA1 has limited official ROCm support (ROCm 4.5+ with GFX override). Community reports mixed results. Requires cold_start + hang_check before promotion.

amd-rdna2-dgpu.description: AMD RDNA2 discrete GPU — RX 6000 series (gfx1030/1031/1032/1034). Navi21/22/23/24.
amd-rdna2-dgpu.notes: RDNA2 dGPUs are in the official ROCm 5.x/6.x support matrix. Promote to production after passing all 6 stages on a specific host.

amd-rdna3-dgpu.description: AMD RDNA3 discrete GPU — RX 7000 series (gfx1100/1101/1102). Navi31/32/33.
amd-rdna3-dgpu.notes: RDNA3 supported in ROCm 5.5+. gfx1100 is the primary validated target.

amd-cdna-instinct.description: AMD CDNA Instinct MI-series — gfx908/gfx90a/gfx940. Data-center compute GPUs.
amd-cdna-instinct.notes: ROCm is the primary supported backend for Instinct cards. Default to ROCm immediately.

nvidia-turing-plus.description: NVIDIA Turing and later (RTX 20/30/40 series, A-series). CUDA 11+ supported.

intel-integrated.description: Intel integrated GPU — HD/Iris/UHD/Xe. Vulkan via ANV driver.

intel-arc-dgpu.description: Intel Arc A/B-series discrete GPU. Vulkan via Xe driver.

apple-silicon.description: Apple M-series — AGX GPU. Metal backend via llama.cpp GGML Metal.

generic-cpu.description: CPU-only host or unrecognized GPU. Universal fallback.

rocm_compatibility_matrix._note: Entries reflect AMD official support matrix as of ROCm 6.x. 'promotion_eligible: false' means this target should never be promoted to ROCm default — blocked at Stage 1.

gfx900.notes: Legacy Vega10 — limited ROCm 5.x support, not in 6.x matrix. Vulkan preferred.

gfx902.notes: APU with shared VRAM. Not in any ROCm support matrix. Vulkan only.

gfx90c.notes: APU Vega iGPU. Not in ROCm support matrix. ErrorDeviceLost at high layer counts. Vulkan with --n-gpu-layers 12 is the validated path.

gfx906.notes: Well-supported discrete Vega20. Treat as candidate after cold_start validation.

gfx908.notes: CDNA1 data-center GPU. Fully supported. Default ROCm.

gfx90a.notes: CDNA2 data-center GPU. Fully supported. Default ROCm.

gfx1010.notes: Limited ROCm support. Community-validated with GFX override. Needs cold_start + hang_check before promotion.

gfx1030.notes: Primary RDNA2 target. Full ROCm support in 5.x+.

gfx1031.notes: RDNA2 — supported with GFX override in most cases.

gfx1032.notes: RDNA2 mainstream — supported with GFX override.

gfx1034.notes: RDNA2 budget — limited VRAM (4 GB). Promotion requires benchmark confirming headroom.

gfx1035.notes: APU iGPU. Not in official ROCm matrix. Community attempts with GFX override have mixed results. Blocked until explicit validation.

gfx1036.notes: APU iGPU. Not in official ROCm matrix. Vulkan preferred.

gfx1102.notes: RDNA3 budget. ROCm 6.x with GFX override.

class_detection_order: Then match on gpu_vendor + is_mobile + cpu_vendor combination
Fall back to generic-cpu when no class matches
